title: Jesuh Khe Phungah Ka Tu Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Itna kam khum bekbek hi a,
Jesuh khephung ah ka tu a,
Tang lai thute ka phawk hi;
Hong it pha mahmah na hi
Ka lungsim sung hong zen hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh khephung ah ka tawlnga a,
Ka vangik pi teng ka suahna,
Ka deih khempeuh ka ngen hi;
Ka nget khempeuh A hong pia a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong Hon Topa Na thupha tawh,
Nangma lungsim kei hong guan aw,
Gen ing, kei Nang aa hi khin.
